workspace.renderError: 다이어그램을 렌더링할 수 없습니다. 문법을 확인하고 다시 시도하세요.
workspace.fallbackBody: 이 작업 영역은 사이트 구조에 연결되어 있습니다. 전용 렌더러는 다음 단계에서 추가됩니다.
workspace.treeHint: 객체와 배열은 읽기 쉬운 트리로 펼쳐집니다.

footer.summary: 개발 문서, 아키텍처 노트, 제품 사양, AI 워크플로를 위한 빠른 온라인 다이어그램 미리보기 및 변환 도구입니다.

metadata.title: Diagram Preview Tools - Mermaid, PlantUML, Markdown, Graphviz Online
metadata.description: Mermaid, PlantUML, Markdown, Graphviz, D2, draw.io, 마인드맵, JSON, YAML 및 개발자 다이어그램을 온라인으로 미리보고 변환하세요.

hero.subtitle: Mermaid, PlantUML, Markdown, Graphviz, D2, draw.io, 마인드맵 및 개발자 다이어그램을 온라인으로 미리보세요.

why: Use one focused workspace for text diagrams, documentation previews, and file-based diagram formats.
Most rendering runs in the browser, keeping drafts fast while reducing unnecessary round trips.
Every tool has its own URL, metadata, related tools, and export actions so it can grow as a search-friendly utility.

faq.question: What can DiagramPreview render?
faq.answer: The first release focuses on Mermaid, PlantUML, Markdown, Graphviz, JSON, YAML, and structured preview pages for the remaining diagram formats.

faq.question: Do diagrams upload to a server?
faq.answer: Browser-first tools render locally when possible. PlantUML uses a server URL in the first version so the renderer can be replaced later.

faq.question: Can I export diagrams?
faq.answer: Supported renderers expose SVG, PNG, copy, and print-style PDF actions from the workspace toolbar.

mermaid-preview.name: Mermaid 미리보기
mermaid-preview.shortDescription: Mermaid 미리보기을 온라인 작업 영역에서 예제, 검증, 내보내기와 함께 사용할 수 있습니다.
mermaid-preview.seoDescription: Mermaid 미리보기로 예제, 명확한 오류, 내보내기 기능과 함께 다이어그램을 온라인으로 확인하세요.
mermaid-preview.intro: 전문 작업 영역에 내용을 붙여 넣고 Mermaid 미리보기으로 다이어그램, 문서 또는 데이터 구조를 검토하세요.
mermaid-preview.placeholder: Mermaid 미리보기 내용을 여기에 붙여 넣으세요...

flowchart.label: Flowchart
flowchart.code:
flowchart TD
  A[Start] --> B{Ready?}
  B -- Yes --> C[Preview diagram]
  B -- No --> D[Edit source]
  D --> B
  C --> E[Export]

sequence.label: Sequence
sequence.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant App
  participant API
  User->>App: Paste diagram
  App->>API: Validate request
  API-->>App: OK
  App-->>User: Render preview

class.label: Class
class.code:
classDiagram
  class Diagram {
    +string source
    +render()
    +exportSvg()
  }
  class MermaidDiagram
  Diagram <|-- MermaidDiagram

state.label: State
state.code:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Editing
  Editing --> Rendering
  Rendering --> Ready
  Rendering --> Error
  Error --> Editing
  Ready --> Exported

gantt.label: Gantt
gantt.code:
gantt
  title Release plan
  dateFormat  YYYY-MM-DD
  section Build
  Scaffold app :done, a1, 2026-06-01, 2d
  Tool preview :active, a2, after a1, 4d
  SEO pages :a3, after a2, 2d

er.label: ER diagram

faq.question: Mermaid 미리보기을 온라인에서 사용할 수 있나요?
faq.answer: 네. 이 페이지는 DiagramPreview의 브라우저 작업 영역을 사용합니다.

faq.question: 결과를 내보낼 수 있나요?
faq.answer: 지원되는 렌더러는 SVG, PNG, 복사, 인쇄형 PDF 작업을 제공합니다.

seoBody: Mermaid 미리보기은 개발자, PM, 기술 작성자가 다이어그램과 구조화된 콘텐츠를 빠르게 검토하도록 돕습니다.
작업 영역은 원본과 미리보기를 나란히 보여 주어 게시 전 문법, 계층, 레이아웃 문제를 찾기 쉽게 합니다.
각 도구는 독립 URL, metadata, FAQ, 관련 도구 링크를 갖추어 검색 가능한 유틸리티 페이지로 성장할 수 있습니다.

plantuml-preview.name: PlantUML 미리보기
plantuml-preview.shortDescription: PlantUML 미리보기을 온라인 작업 영역에서 예제, 검증, 내보내기와 함께 사용할 수 있습니다.
plantuml-preview.seoDescription: PlantUML 미리보기로 예제, 명확한 오류, 내보내기 기능과 함께 다이어그램을 온라인으로 확인하세요.
plantuml-preview.intro: 전문 작업 영역에 내용을 붙여 넣고 PlantUML 미리보기으로 다이어그램, 문서 또는 데이터 구조를 검토하세요.
plantuml-preview.placeholder: PlantUML 미리보기 내용을 여기에 붙여 넣으세요...

sequence.label: Sequence
sequence.code:
@startuml
actor User
participant App
participant Service
User -> App: Submit diagram
App -> Service: Render
Service --> App: SVG
App --> User: Preview
@enduml

# Checkout flow

```mermaid
sequenceDiagram
  participant Buyer
  participant Store
  Buyer->>Store: Place order
  Store-->>Buyer: Confirmation
```

The diagram is rendered inside the Markdown preview.

api.label: API call
api.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Client
  participant API
  participant DB
  Client->>API: GET /diagrams
  API->>DB: Query diagrams
  DB-->>API: Rows
  API-->>Client: JSON

login.label: Login flow
login.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant App
  participant Auth
  User->>App: Enter credentials
  App->>Auth: Verify
  Auth-->>App: Token
  App-->>User: Dashboard

payment.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant Buyer
  participant Store
  participant PSP
  Buyer->>Store: Checkout
  Store->>PSP: Create payment
  PSP-->>Store: Confirmed
  Store-->>Buyer: Receipt

faq.answer: 지원되는 렌더러는 SVG, PNG, 복사, 인쇄형 PDF 작업을 제공합니다.

seoBody: 시퀀스 다이어그램 미리보기은 개발자, PM, 기술 작성자가 다이어그램과 구조화된 콘텐츠를 빠르게 검토하도록 돕습니다.
작업 영역은 원본과 미리보기를 나란히 보여 주어 게시 전 문법, 계층, 레이아웃 문제를 찾기 쉽게 합니다.
각 도구는 독립 URL, metadata, FAQ, 관련 도구 링크를 갖추어 검색 가능한 유틸리티 페이지로 성장할 수 있습니다.

workflow.label: Workflow
workflow.code:
name: preview
steps:
  - install
  - build
  - verify

kubernetes.label: Kubernetes
kubernetes.code:
apiVersion: v1
kind: Service
metadata:
  name: diagram-preview
spec:
  ports:
    - port: 80

config.label: Config
config.code:
site:
  name: DiagramPreview
  locales:
    - en
    - zh-CN
exports:
  svg: true
  png: true

faq.question: YAML을 다이어그램으로을 온라인에서 사용할 수 있나요?

ai-diagram-generator.name: AI 다이어그램 생성기
ai-diagram-generator.intro: 원하는 다이어그램을 설명하고 Mermaid 유형을 선택하면 AI가 편집 가능한 코드와 미리보기를 생성합니다.
ai-diagram-generator.emptyPreview: 원하는 다이어그램을 설명하고 Mermaid 유형을 선택하면 AI가 편집 가능한 코드와 미리보기를 생성합니다.

system.label: System flow
system.prompt: Create a system architecture flow for a web app with browser, API gateway, auth service, billing service, queue, worker, database, and object storage.

api.label: API flow
api.prompt: Create a sequence diagram for a client calling an API, API validating auth, reading database records, and returning JSON.

product.label: Product journey
product.prompt: Create a product onboarding flow with signup, email verification, workspace creation, first diagram preview, export, and feedback.

howToUse: Mermaid 유형을 선택하고 AI로 코드를 생성합니다.
결과를 확인하고 필요하면 편집한 뒤 SVG 또는 PNG로 내보냅니다.

faq.question: 어떤 AI 제공자를 사용하나요?
faq.answer: 서버는 먼저 Gemini를 시도하고, 사용할 수 없거나 제한되었거나 설정되지 않은 경우 DeepSeek로 fallback합니다.

faq.question: 어떤 AI 제공자를 사용하나요?
faq.answer: 서버는 먼저 Gemini를 시도하고, 사용할 수 없거나 제한되었거나 설정되지 않은 경우 DeepSeek로 fallback합니다.

seoBody: 자연어 프롬프트로 Mermaid 다이어그램을 생성합니다.
원하는 다이어그램을 설명하고 Mermaid 유형을 선택하면 AI가 편집 가능한 코드와 미리보기를 생성합니다.
서버는 먼저 Gemini를 시도하고, 사용할 수 없거나 제한되었거나 설정되지 않은 경우 DeepSeek로 fallback합니다.

text-to-mermaid.name: 텍스트를 Mermaid로
text-to-mermaid.shortDescription: 제품 노트, 장애 기록, 아키텍처 텍스트를 Mermaid로 변환합니다.
text-to-mermaid.seoDescription: 제품 노트, 장애 기록, 아키텍처 텍스트를 Mermaid로 변환합니다.
text-to-mermaid.intro: 요구사항, 노트, 프로세스 설명을 붙여 넣어 Mermaid로 변환하세요.
text-to-mermaid.emptyPreview: 요구사항, 노트, 프로세스 설명을 붙여 넣어 Mermaid로 변환하세요.

requirements.label: Requirements
requirements.prompt: Users paste diagram code, the app validates syntax, renders a preview, allows export, and suggests related tools.

incident.label: Incident
incident.prompt: A customer reports a broken export. Support checks logs, engineering reproduces, a fix is deployed, and support confirms resolution.

architecture.label: Architecture
architecture.prompt: Browser sends source text to a Next.js API route. The API calls Gemini first, falls back to DeepSeek, then returns Mermaid code for browser preview.

howToUse: Mermaid 유형을 선택하고 AI로 코드를 생성합니다.
결과를 확인하고 필요하면 편집한 뒤 SVG 또는 PNG로 내보냅니다.

요구사항, 노트, 프로세스 설명을 붙여 넣어 Mermaid로 변환하세요.

mermaid-ai-fixer.shortDescription: 깨진 Mermaid 문법을 AI로 고치고 가독성을 높입니다.

brokenFlow.label: Broken flow
brokenFlow.prompt: Fix the syntax and keep the same flow.
brokenFlow.code:
flowchart TD
  A[Start --> B{Ready?}
  B -- yes --> C[Render]
  B -- no --> D[Edit]

brokenSequence.label: Broken sequence
brokenSequence.prompt: Fix this sequence diagram and keep the participants.
brokenSequence.code:
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant App
  User->App: Paste source
  App--User: Preview

brokenState.label: Broken state
brokenState.code:
stateDiagram-v2
  [*] --> Editing
  Editing -> Rendering
  Rendering --> Ready
  Rendering --> Error
  Error -> Editing

openapi-to-sequence.name: OpenAPI to Sequence Diagram
openapi-to-sequence.shortDescription: Convert OpenAPI paths into a Mermaid sequence diagram locally.
openapi-to-sequence.seoDescription: Convert OpenAPI paths into a Mermaid sequence diagram locally.
openapi-to-sequence.intro: Paste OpenAPI JSON or YAML and turn API operations into a sequence diagram that explains request handling.
openapi-to-sequence.placeholder: Paste OpenAPI JSON or YAML here...
openapi-to-sequence.emptyPreview: Your API sequence diagram will appear here.

petstore.label: 반려동물 API
petstore.code:
openapi: 3.0.3
info:
  title: Pet Store
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /pets:
    get:
      summary: List pets
    post:
      summary: Create pet
  /pets/{petId}:
    get:
      summary: Get pet details
    delete:
      summary: Delete pet

auth.label: 인증 API
auth.code:
openapi: 3.1.0
info:
  title: Auth Service
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /login:
    post:
      summary: Validate credentials
  /sessions/{id}:
    get:
      summary: Read session
    delete:
      summary: Revoke session

orders.label: 주문 API
orders.code:
openapi: 3.0.0
info:
  title: Orders
  version: 1.0.0
paths:
  /orders:
    post:
      summary: Create order
  /orders/{orderId}/pay:
    post:
      summary: Start payment
  /orders/{orderId}/shipments:
    get:
      summary: List shipments

howToUse: Paste source text into the editor.
Edit the input and export the rendered SVG or PNG when the diagram looks right.

faq.question: Does this use AI?
faq.answer: No. This tool runs parsing and visualization locally in the browser.

seoBody: Convert OpenAPI paths into a Mermaid sequence diagram locally.
Paste OpenAPI JSON or YAML and turn API operations into a sequence diagram that explains request handling.
DiagramPreview keeps the workflow editable so you can revise the source and regenerate the visualization quickly.

architecture-diagram-generator.name: Architecture Diagram Generator
architecture-diagram-generator.shortDescription: Generate Mermaid architecture diagrams from product or system notes with AI.
architecture-diagram-generator.seoDescription: Generate Mermaid architecture diagrams from product or system notes with AI.
architecture-diagram-generator.intro: Describe a system architecture and generate editable Mermaid diagrams for services, queues, databases, clients, and external integrations.
architecture-diagram-generator.emptyPreview: Describe a system architecture and generate editable Mermaid diagrams for services, queues, databases, clients, and external integrations.

saas.label: SaaS architecture
saas.prompt: Design a SaaS architecture with browser, CDN, Next.js app, API gateway, auth service, billing service, worker queue, PostgreSQL, Redis, object storage, and email provider.

eventDriven.label: Event driven
eventDriven.prompt: Create an event-driven order platform with checkout API, order service, payment provider, event bus, inventory service, shipping service, analytics pipeline, and data warehouse.

edge.label: Edge deployment
edge.prompt: Show an edge image processing architecture with users, edge cache, upload API, job queue, image workers, object storage, metadata database, and webhook callbacks.

howToUse: Describe the target diagram in plain language.
Choose a diagram type and generate code with AI.
Review the output, edit it if needed, then export or copy the source.

faq.question: Which AI provider is used?
faq.answer: The server tries Gemini first and falls back to DeepSeek when Gemini is unavailable, rate-limited, or not configured.

faq.question: Are API keys exposed to the browser?
faq.answer: No. API keys are read only on the server through environment variables.

seoBody: Generate Mermaid architecture diagrams from product or system notes with AI.
Describe a system architecture and generate editable Mermaid diagrams for services, queues, databases, clients, and external integrations.
The server tries Gemini first and falls back to DeepSeek when Gemini is unavailable, rate-limited, or not configured.

ai-plantuml-generator.name: AI PlantUML Generator
ai-plantuml-generator.shortDescription: Generate PlantUML diagrams from natural language with Gemini and DeepSeek fallback.
ai-plantuml-generator.seoDescription: Generate PlantUML diagrams from natural language with Gemini and DeepSeek fallback.
ai-plantuml-generator.intro: Describe a sequence, component, class, activity, use case, or state diagram and generate editable PlantUML source.
ai-plantuml-generator.emptyPreview: Describe a sequence, component, class, activity, use case, or state diagram and generate editable PlantUML source.

sequence.label: Sequence
sequence.prompt: Create a PlantUML sequence diagram for a user exporting a diagram as PNG: browser requests export, app renders SVG, conversion service creates PNG, and browser downloads the file.

component.label: Component
component.prompt: Create a PlantUML component diagram for DiagramPreview with web app, renderer modules, AI API route, Gemini provider, DeepSeek provider, and export utilities.

activity.label: Activity
activity.prompt: Create a PlantUML activity diagram for validating pasted diagram code, rendering a preview, showing errors, and exporting if successful.

howToUse: Describe the target diagram in plain language.
Choose a diagram type and generate code with AI.
Review the output, edit it if needed, then export or copy the source.

faq.answer: The server tries Gemini first and falls back to DeepSeek when Gemini is unavailable, rate-limited, or not configured.

faq.question: Are API keys exposed to the browser?
faq.answer: No. API keys are read only on the server through environment variables.

tools.title: 모든 다이어그램 도구
tools.description: 형식, 워크플로, 다이어그램 유형별로 DiagramPreview 도구를 탐색하세요.

preview-tools.title: 미리보기 도구
preview-tools.description: 텍스트 및 파일 기반 다이어그램을 집중형 브라우저 작업 영역에서 미리보세요.

converters.title: 다이어그램 변환 도구
converters.description: 구조화된 텍스트와 데이터를 읽기 쉬운 다이어그램과 내보낼 수 있는 미리보기로 변환하세요.

developer-diagrams.title: 개발자 다이어그램
developer-diagrams.description: 아키텍처, API 흐름, 의존성, 엔지니어링 문서를 위한 다이어그램을 만드세요.

data-visualizers.title: 데이터 및 스키마 도구

ai-diagram.title: AI 다이어그램 도구
ai-diagram.description: AI 생성 다이어그램을 text-first 도구로 검토, 다듬기, 내보내기하세요.

index.title: 개발자를 위한 다이어그램 가이드

mermaid-preview-guide.title: Mermaid 미리보기 가이드
mermaid-preview-guide.description: Mermaid 미리보기 가이드：다이어그램을 온라인으로 미리보기, 변환, 내보내기, 문서화하는 실용 가이드입니다.
mermaid-preview-guide.excerpt: 다이어그램을 온라인으로 미리보기, 변환, 내보내기, 문서화하는 실용 가이드입니다.

sections.heading: 워크플로 권장 사항
paragraphs: DiagramPreview는 원본, 미리보기, 관련 도구, 내보내기 작업을 하나의 작업 영역에 모아 기술 문서, 아키텍처 노트, AI 생성 콘텐츠 검토에 적합합니다.
예제에서 시작해 원본을 조금씩 수정하고, 내보내기 전에 미리보기를 확인하세요.

sections.heading: 게시 전 확인
paragraphs: 나중에 쉽게 수정할 수 있도록 원본 텍스트를 내보낸 파일과 함께 보관하세요.
AI가 만든 다이어그램이라면 이름, 방향, 그룹, 기술적 의미를 먼저 확인하세요.

about.title: About
about.description: DiagramPreview is an online diagram preview and conversion workspace for developers, product teams, architects, and technical writers.

sections.heading: What DiagramPreview is
paragraphs: DiagramPreview helps people turn text, structured data, and diagram files into visual previews that are easier to inspect, share, and export.
The site is built for Mermaid, PlantUML, Markdown, Graphviz, D2, draw.io, mind maps, JSON, YAML, and future developer diagram formats.

sections.heading: How the product is designed
paragraphs: The first screen focuses on tools, search, and categories instead of a marketing-only landing page. Each tool has its own URL, metadata, related links, FAQ, and export workflow.

help-center.title: Help Center
help-center.description: Find help for using DiagramPreview tools, previews, exports, and common diagram workflows.

sections.heading: Using tools
paragraphs: Open a tool, paste source content, choose an example when useful, and review the preview pane for output or syntax errors.
Supported tools expose copy, SVG, PNG, and print-style PDF actions when the renderer can provide them.

sections.heading: Troubleshooting
paragraphs: If a diagram does not render, reduce the source to a smaller example, check the syntax for the format, and then add sections back gradually.
For PlantUML, the first version uses a PlantUML server URL, so network access to that endpoint may affect previews.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: Contact DiagramPreview for feedback, support, partnerships, and product questions.

sections.heading: Email
paragraphs: For feedback, write to feedback@diagrampreview.com. For general contact, write to hello@diagrampreview.com.

sections.heading: What to include
paragraphs: Please include the tool URL, the diagram format, a short description of the issue, and whether the problem affects preview, export, localization, or SEO content.

sections.heading: Data handling
paragraphs: DiagramPreview is designed as a browser-first tool site. Where possible, rendering happens in the browser rather than requiring diagram content to be sent to a backend.
Some third-party rendering approaches, such as the first PlantUML server URL implementation, may request a remote preview image.

sections.heading: Contact
paragraphs: For privacy questions, contact hello@diagrampreview.com. This page is a practical product policy page and should be reviewed by legal counsel before commercial launch.

terms-of-use.title: Terms of Use
terms-of-use.description: Terms for using DiagramPreview tools and content.

sections.heading: Use of the service
paragraphs: DiagramPreview provides online tools for previewing, converting, and exporting diagrams. You are responsible for the content you paste, upload, preview, or export.
Do not use the service to process content you are not allowed to use or share.

sections.heading: No warranty
paragraphs: The tools are provided as-is. Renderers, exports, examples, and documentation may change as the product evolves.
This page is a practical starting point and should be reviewed by legal counsel before commercial launch.
